headline: Thunderbolt brings self-hosted AI sovereignty to your desktop
lede: Vendor lock-in ends where your local hardware begins. Thunderbolt provides the secure infrastructure needed to run frontier-grade models while keeping your data strictly within your own perimeter.

headline: Omi builds an open-source second brain for your daily life
lede: We are sketching the architecture of total recall. By transcribing ambient audio and screen activity, this toolkit turns your scattered daily interactions into a structured, searchable knowledge base.

headline: OpenAI Agents SDK standardizes complex multi-agent workflows
lede: Precision is the hallmark of modern agentic systems. This framework introduces a rigorous structure for managing state, tool handoffs, and sandbox execution in long-running autonomous workflows.

headline: Evolver codifies prompt refinement into auditable evolution cycles
lede: Stop guessing at your prompts and start documenting their evolution. This protocol treats agent behavior as a versioned asset, ensuring every adjustment is tracked, analyzed, and reproducible.

headline: DeepGEMM pushes NVIDIA hardware to 1550 TFLOPS
lede: Raw performance is the only metric that matters at the silicon level. DeepGEMM strips away template bloat to deliver lean, high-speed tensor primitives for modern language models.

headline: Dive into LLMs offers a complete curriculum for AI developers
lede: True expertise requires a firm grasp of underlying mechanics. This comprehensive repository aggregates research and practical tutorials to bridge the gap between abstract theory and operational implementation.

headline: Bring Claude Desktop to Linux with native package support
lede: The best AI tools should exist where the developers work. This utility wraps the Claude interface for seamless operation on Debian and Fedora, complete with system tray and hotkey support.

headline: RustDesk reaches over 110,000 stars as a remote desktop leader
lede: Open-source remote access has matured into a reliable standard for secure, self-hosted infrastructure. The community continues to flock to this Rust-based solution for its uncompromising approach to privacy and control.

headline: Automate mobile app reverse engineering with Claude Code
lede: Deobfuscating complex binaries is no longer a purely manual marathon. This pipeline flows API extraction tasks through AI agents, mapping out network call patterns with unprecedented speed.

headline: ArcKit automates compliance for large-scale enterprise technology projects
lede: Enterprise architecture demands consistency, auditability, and rigor. ArcKit integrates these governance requirements directly into the developer's environment, ensuring every design decision remains compliant and well-documented.
